name: Four Great Cottage Cheese Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
These are good on basic whole-wheat bread, but try having them in Syrian flatbreads or as open-face sandwiches heated up in the oven. On hot days these combinations make a perfect cook lunch served on a bed of lettuce with crackers or muffins on the side.
Food Exchanges per serving:
1st Sandwich: 2 MEATS EXCHANGES + 2 FATS EXCHANGES (~>or<- 3 MEATS EXCHANGES); CAL: 141; PRO: 11gm; FAT: 4gm; CAR: 6gm
2nd Sandwich: 2 MEATS EXCHANGES + 1 FAT EXCHANGE; CAL: 70; PRO: 8gm; FAT: 2gm; CAR: 2gm
3rd Sandwich: 2 MEATS EXCHANGES; CAL: 6gm; FAT: 2gm; CAR: 1gm
4th Sandwich: 2 MEATS EXCHANGES + 2 FATS EXCHANGES + 2 FRUITS EXCHANGES; CAL: 104; PRO: 6gm; FAT: 2gm; CAR: 11gm
